evals.name: search_account
evals.prompt: 帮我搜索微信公众号「人民日报」
assertions: Response should run the search command with the account name
Response should present results with fakeid
Response should handle multiple results with AskUserQuestion

evals.name: fetch_article
evals.prompt: 帮我获取这篇微信公众号文章的内容：https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/abc123
assertions: Response should run the fetch command with the article URL
Response should extract article title, author, and content
Response should handle the HTML content output
